_note: BuilderPulse example config. Copy to ~/.builderpulse/config.json (or set BUILDERPULSE_CONFIG_PATH to point here) and edit. Empty list for a source means 'do not fetch from this source' (cron will pass with no items, no error). Sensitive channel fields (botToken, apiKey, apiSecret, sessdata, password, secret) are masked in `bp config show` output. Set them via environment variables BUILDERPULSE_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN etc. - see README Configuration section.

podcast._note: List of RSS feed URLs to fetch podcast episodes from.

twitter._note: List of X/Twitter account handles to fetch. Requires X_BEARER_TOKEN environment variable (or X API v2 bearer token in your account settings).

blog._note: List of blog URLs to scrape. Use full URLs (https://...).

bilibili._note: List of Bilibili user IDs (numeric, e.g. 123456) to fetch videos from.

youtube._note: List of YouTube channel IDs (UC...) to fetch videos from.
